inputs.label: Shaft Speed (RPM)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the shaft in revolutions per minute.

inputs.label: Number of Balls
inputs.businessContext: Number of rolling elements in the bearing.

inputs.label: Ball Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of a single rolling element.

inputs.label: Pitch Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the circle passing through the centers of the rolling elements.

inputs.label: Contact Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angular contact angle of the bearing in degrees.

formulas.bpfo: ( numBalls / 2 ) * ( 1 - ( ballDiameter / pitchDiameter ) * Math.cos( contactAngle * Math.PI / 180 ) ) * shaftSpeed / 60
formulas.bpfi: ( numBalls / 2 ) * ( 1 + ( ballDiameter / pitchDiameter ) * Math.cos( contactAngle * Math.PI / 180 ) ) * shaftSpeed / 60
formulas.ftf: ( 1 / 2 ) * ( 1 - ( ballDiameter / pitchDiameter ) * Math.cos( contactAngle * Math.PI / 180 ) ) * shaftSpeed / 60
formulas.bsf: ( pitchDiameter / ( 2 * ballDiameter ) ) * ( 1 - Math.pow( ballDiameter / pitchDiameter, 2 ) * Math.pow( Math.cos( contactAngle * Math.PI / 180 ), 2 ) ) * shaftSpeed / 60
